message.content:
@startuml
title Update States

participant "Simulator" as Simulator
participant "TrackControllers" as TrackControllers
participant "WaysideController" as WaysideController
participant "PLC" as PLC
participant "WaysideControllerGUI" as WaysideControllerGUI
participant "TrackModel" as TrackModel

rectangle "Wayside Controller" {
  Simulator -> TrackControllers: timeUpdate(SimTime)
  
  loop waysideControllers
    TrackControllers -> WaysideController: updateStates()
    
    loop associatedBlocks
      WaysideController -> TrackControllers: receiveBlockInfo(line, blockId)
      TrackControllers -> TrackControllers: getBlockInfo(line, blockId)
      TrackControllers -> TrackModel: Block
      TrackModel --> TrackControllers: Block
      
      WaysideController -> WaysideController: runPLC(occupancy)
      WaysideController -> PLC: getLogic()
      PLC --> WaysideController: String logic
      
      if(newState != currentState)
        TrackControllers -> TrackControllers: transmitState(line, blockId, state)
        TrackControllers -> TrackModel: setState(line, blockId, state)
        TrackModel --> TrackControllers: Success
      endif
      
      if(Wayside Controller Selected)
        WaysideController -> WaysideControllerGUI: displayInfo()
        WaysideControllerGUI -> TrackControllers: receiveBlockInfo(line, blockId)
        TrackControllers -> TrackControllers: getBlockInfo(line, blockId)
        TrackControllers -> TrackModel: Block
        TrackModel --> TrackControllers: Block
        
        TrackControllers -> WaysideController: Block
      endif
    end
  end
}

@enduml
